name: Canon PIXMA Pro-100
notes: 4800x2400 DPI max. Driver processes at 600 DPI natively (~6 dots/pixel at 100 PPI). IMPORTANT: Disable 'Auto Photo Fix' in Canon Professional Print & Layout — it applies sharpening that smears stripe edges. Print at 'Actual Size' / 100% scale. For lenticular, use Canon PPL app rather than macOS Preview for explicit size control.
